key_points.text: Revenue surged 65% year-over-year to $215.938 billion in fiscal 2026, driven by accelerated computing and AI platform adoption, with Data Center revenue reaching $193.737 billion.
Net income reached $120.067 billion in fiscal 2026, up 65% from $72.880 billion in fiscal 2025, with net margin at 55.6%, demonstrating exceptional profitability.

Operating income increased 58% to $139.297 billion, with Compute Networking segment operating income growing 57% despite a $4.5 billion H20 inventory charge, indicating strong underlying operational performance.

citation.quote: Operating Income... $ 139,297... $ 87,960... The year over year increase in Compute Networking segment operating income was driven by growth in revenue, partially offset by a $4.5 billion charge associated with H20 excess inventory

key_points.text: Data Center Compute revenue grew 59% and Data Center Networking revenue surged 142%, driven by Blackwell platform adoption and NVLink fabric for GB200/GB300 systems.

citation.quote: Revenue from Data Center computing grew 59%... Revenue from Data Center networking grew 142% driven by the introduction and continued ramp of NVLink compute fabric for GB200 and GB300 systems

key_points.text: Gross profit margin remained elevated at 71.1% in fiscal 2026 (vs. 75.0% in fiscal 2025), reflecting strong pricing power despite increased inventory provisions.
Q1 fiscal 2027 revenue reached $81.615 billion, up 85% from $44.062 billion in Q1 fiscal 2026, with net income of $58.321 billion, demonstrating sustained momentum.
Strong balance sheet with current assets of $150.995 billion and total shareholders' equity of $195.474 billion as of April 26, 2026, providing substantial financial flexibility.

citation.quote: Total current assets 150,995... Total shareholders' equity 195,474

key_points.text: Expected to commence $22.7 billion in data center leases between fiscal 2027-2030 with 1.8 to 20 year terms, reflecting confidence in demand for AI infrastructure support.

citation.quote: Between fiscal years 2027 and 2030, we expect to commence leases with future obligations of $ 22.7 billion, primarily data center leases to support our research and development efforts
